whatIsSoarStarter.question: What is SoarStarter?
whatIsSoarStarter.answer: SoarStarter is a production-ready SaaS template built with TanStack Start, React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. It provides authentication, payments, dashboards, i18n, and more out of the box.

techStack.question: What tech stack does it use?
techStack.answer: SoarStarter is built with TanStack Start (full-stack SSR React), Better Auth, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL, Creem payments, Resend email, Tailwind CSS v4, and shadcn/ui components.

customization.question: How customizable is it?
customization.answer: Every aspect is customizable. The codebase uses clean architecture patterns, type-safe configurations, and modular components. You can swap out any provider or add new features easily.

support.question: What kind of support is available?
support.answer: Free users get community support via GitHub Discussions. Pro and Lifetime users get priority support with faster response times and direct access to the team.

updates.question: Do I get future updates?
updates.answer: Pro subscribers receive updates throughout their subscription. Lifetime plan holders get all future updates forever, including new features, improvements, and security patches.

cta.heading: Ready to launch your SaaS?
cta.description: Start building your next project with SoarStarter. Save months of development time with our production-ready template.
